A3-F1-diversity-tag-index-vs-MAE.notes: auto-drop now consults _gate_stats['per_member_mae']; ties drop alphabetically-larger tag.

A3-F2-K2-tiebreaker.notes: When MAE-a == MAE-b within fp64 noise the worse-idx is now picked by tag ordering rather than always idx=1.

A3-F3-compare-ensembles-deepcopy.notes: Replaced copy.deepcopy with one-pass dict comprehension; aliases nested arrays (caller-owned), drops only flagged keys. Removed unused 'import copy'.

A3-F4-choose-ensemble-flavour-lazy-impor.notes: Created src/mlframe/training/core/_ensemble_chooser.py as leaf module. _phase_train_one_target re-exports; _phase_train_one_target_ensembling + _phase_finalize import from leaf directly. No lazy in-function imports remain.

A3-F5-rrf-k-unconditional-stamp.notes: Stamp gated on `'rrf' in common_params.get('ensembling_methods')` OR `'rrf' in _ensembles.keys()`. Regression suites (where score_ensemble filters out rrf) no longer pollute metadata.

A3-F6-weighted-median-branch-no-weights.notes: Removed misleading try/except that claimed weighted via inverted_cdf but never passed weights=. The cross-MEMBER median (axis=0) cannot meaningfully use per-row weights; documented inline. Downstream MAE weighting unchanged.

A3-F7-group-aware-median-per-row.notes: compute_member_quality_gate now collapses arr to G groups (one row per group) via sample-weight-aware per-group prediction average + per-group mean weight. Dense groups no longer dominate the per-member MAE.

A3-F8-uniformity-misses-oof-probs.notes: _has_probs() and is_regression detection both now include oof_probs.

A3-F9-multiclass-diversity-flatten.notes: compute_high_correlation_pairs now computes per-class K-K corr matrices and averages off-diagonal entries via np.nanmean; binary path collapses to single-column behaviour by construction. Introduced helpers _pairwise_corr_or_nan + _emit_pairs_above_threshold to share logic between preds- and probs-attribute branches.

commits.subject: fix(models/ensembling): per-class avg Pearson for multiclass diversity + shallow inner pop in compare_ensembles
fix(models/ensembling): quality gate group-aware median collapses per group; documented unweighted predict-side anchor
fix(models/ensembling): score_ensemble drops higher-MAE member on diversity auto-drop; deterministic K=2 tiebreak; uniformity inspects oof_probs
refactor(training/core): move _choose_ensemble_flavour to leaf module; ensembling sibling top-level imports it
test(ensembling): regression sensors for the A3 P2/Low cluster

pre_existing_failures_not_owned: tests/training/test_ensembling_caching_future_fixes.py::TestCACHE_P1_7_SizeSafetyFactor::test_safety_factor_function_present (source-inspection test pinning literal text in _phase_helpers.py; the literal moved during a prior refactor — out of my scope)
